_comment_2: Hand-written to give fraiseql-server a non-empty schema so it boots cleanly under the observers overlay. The docs-test only exercises /health, /runtime/health, /api/observers/dlq, and the framework-symptom FW-* assertions — no real data reads required. We DELIBERATELY do NOT pre-install observer definitions in this fixture: at frozen SHA the docs-test PG fixture has no tb_observer table (FW-15 #342), so observer-runtime startup errors with `relation "tb_observer" does not exist`. The docs-test asserts THAT symptom remains present. When Phase 09 lands the tb_observer migration auto-application, this fixture must be paired with `observers-migrations.sql` (which applies migrations/06_create_observer_management.sql + DLQ + checkpoint migrations).
_source: src/content/docs/features/observers.mdx — Order type used as a placeholder observable-row shape.
_baseline_example: scripts/docs-test/fixtures/postgres/_smoke.compiled.json — used as the shape reference (Cycle 5 smoke).
_note_on_observers_section: There is no `observers` section on the compiled schema — observer definitions live in the `tb_observer` PostgreSQL table, not in compiled schema JSON. The binary's observer runtime reads `tb_observer` at startup; the compiled schema only carries GraphQL type / query / mutation declarations.

types.name: Order
types.description: An order record (placeholder; the docs-test does not read from this view).
